value.body:
## Cleanup candidate

Desktop maintains its own supported agent provider list and provider id guard even though `@cycle/agents` already has a canonical provider catalog.

## Evidence

- Desktop duplicate: `packages/desktop/src/shared/AgentProviders.ts`
  - local `AgentProviderDefinition`
  - local `supportedAgentProviders`
  - local `isAgentProviderId`
- Canonical provider catalog: `packages/agents/src/providers/catalog.ts`
  - `supportedAgentProviders`
  - `isAgentProviderId`
  - `agentProviderDefinitionById`
  - provider defaults imported from provider capability modules
- Desktop consumers include `ProfileLive.ts`, `AppConfigLive.ts`, `DesktopApi.ts`, `ElectronPreferences.ts`, and `renderer/lib/agentProviders.ts`.

## Suggested approach

Re-export or import the canonical provider catalog from `@cycle/agents/providers` and keep desktop-specific schema re-exports in `src/shared/AgentProviders.ts` only where needed. Verify default enabled/concurrency semantics match before removing local definitions.

## Acceptance criteria

- Desktop has one provider catalog source of truth.
- Adding/removing an agent provider in `@cycle/agents` does not require updating a second desktop list.
- Desktop provider setup, preferences, and fallback harnesses preserve existing behavior.

frontmatter.title: Use canonical agent provider catalog in desktop instead of duplicating provider definitions

value.title: Use canonical agent provider catalog in desktop instead of duplicating provider definitions
